import { useEffect } from "react" import "./news.css" function News() { useEffect(() => { async function datafromback() { let res = await fetch("http://localhost:5000/intereststatusnews", { method: "GET", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, credentials: "include", }) let jsonres = await res.json() console.log(jsonres) } datafromback() }) return<>
